rows.label: tlk70000080_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Adel-sama, to think the
Iiran seal would fall into
the Holy Grail's hands...

rows.label: tlk70000080_03_msg0002
rows.name: He was even scarier than I thought.

rows.label: tlk70000080_03_msg0003
rows.name:
I couldn't even stand against
the black thing attacking the city...

rows.label: tlk70000080_03_msg0006
rows.name:
[ML:Dash ]You came to report
to the king, right?

rows.label: tlk70000080_03_msg0007
rows.name:
Sorry for holding you up.
I'll let you through at once.
